mapper.select: SELECT id, receipt_number, reagent_id, reagent_name, quantity, unit_price, operator_id, operator_name, receipt_time, remark FROM warehouse_receipt WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO warehouse_receipt ( receipt_number, reagent_id, reagent_name, quantity, unit_price, operator_id, operator_name, receipt_time, remark ) VALUES ( #{receiptNumber}, #{reagentId}, #{reagentName}, #{quantity}, #{unitPrice}, #{operatorId}, #{operatorName}, #{receiptTime}, #{remark} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE warehouse_receipt
receipt_number = #{receiptNumber},
reagent_id = #{reagentId},
reagent_name = #{reagentName},
quantity = #{quantity},
unit_price = #{unitPrice},
operator_id = #{operatorId},
operator_name = #{operatorName},
receipt_time = #{receiptTime},
remark = #{remark},
WHERE id = #{id}
